🚀

Phase 2 — Coming Soon

Debug Log Viewer, Apex Method Trace, Performance Analyzer, Dependency Viewer, Flow Inspector, Field Usage Tracker, Metadata Diff, and more will be available in Phase 2.

Use the extension toolbar or keyboard shortcuts to access Phase 1 features: Global Search, Record Inspector, SOQL Query Tool, and Smart Navigator.
